title: The Kindergarten
original_title: อนุบาล เด็กโข่ง
overview: Ohm is a kindergarten child, but because of some mushrooms he looks like a grown-up. Because of this he is the undisputed leader of the King-Kong gang. When he falls in love with a high-school student his leadership is called into question.
